articles.title: Danish pension fund excludes SpaceX citing governance and valuation
Roofing Reality Check: Risk Is Rising Even in Quiet Storm Years
articles.summary: A new report from Verisk indicates that despite a decline in overall claims volume in 2025, residential roof replacement and repair costs significantly increased, driven by everyday wind and hail events. The report, "The 2026 Verisk U.S. Roof Report," highlights that hail volatility, aging roofs, and localized weather patterns are contributing to higher risk and costs for U.S. insurance, construction, and housing markets, making roof risk more expensive and less predictable.
articles.content: A new report from Verisk indicates that despite a decline in overall claims volume in 2025, residential roof replacement and repair costs significantly increased, driven by everyday wind and hail events. The report, "The 2026 Verisk U.S. Roof Report," highlights that hail volatility, aging roofs, and localized weather patterns are contributing to higher risk and costs for U.S. insurance, construction, and housing markets, making roof risk more expensive and less predictable.

articles.title: Vår Energi deploys SLB’s Delfi platform for NCS well and field development planning
articles.summary: Vår Energi has expanded its digital collaboration with SLB, deploying the Delfi platform to enhance well and integrated field development planning across its Norwegian Continental Shelf operations. This cloud-native environment connects various stages from exploration to production, allowing teams to work concurrently with shared data and standardized workflows. The initiative aims to reduce cycle times, improve decision-making, and sustain production from mature offshore assets.
articles.content: Vår Energi has expanded its digital collaboration with SLB, deploying the Delfi platform to enhance well and integrated field development planning across its Norwegian Continental Shelf operations. This cloud-native environment connects various stages from exploration to production, allowing teams to work concurrently with shared data and standardized workflows. The initiative aims to reduce cycle times, improve decision-making, and sustain production from mature offshore assets.
